sentences.arabic: يَمْشِي عَلِيٌّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِمُدَّةِ عِشْرِينَ دَقِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Ali hoda svaki dan dvadeset minuta.
sentences.translationEn: Ali walks every day for twenty minutes.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْمَشْيَ يُنَشِّطُ الْجِسْمَ وَالْعَقْلَ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da hodanje aktivira tijelo i um.
sentences.translationEn: He says that walking activates the body and mind.

sentences.arabic: يَخْرُجُ بَعْدَ الْعَشَاءِ وَيَمْشِي فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Izlazi nakon večere i hoda ulicom.
sentences.translationEn: He goes out after dinner and walks in the street.

sentences.arabic: أَحْيَانًا يَصْحَبُهُ صَدِيقُهُ وَيَتَكَلَّمَانِ أَثْنَاءَ الْمَشْيِ.
sentences.translation: Ponekad ga prati prijatelj i razgovaraju tokom hodanja.
sentences.translationEn: Sometimes his friend joins him and they talk while walking.
